## Type of change

## Checklist

- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` passes (frontend types)
- [ ] `ruff check src/ tests/` passes (Python lint)
- [ ] `python -m pytest tests/` passes (Python tests)
- [ ] `cargo clippy && cargo test --all` passes (Rust)
- [ ] Every function that touches user data carries a `sensitivity_tier` annotation
- [ ] I have read the [Contributing guide](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
